chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 63 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.594/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on MA No.595/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on MA No.596/2023 (S/A) 27.01.2023 Mr. Nusrat Hussain J. Memon, Advocate for the applicant ======== O R D E R ======== This Criminal Miscellaneous Application is directed against the Order dated 26.01.2023, whereby the learned Sessions Judge / Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Naushahro Feroze while allowing the Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.6251/2022 (6151/2022) directing to respondent No.2 / SHO Police Station Bhiria Road to record the statement of respondent No.3, namely, Nadeem Ali Mallah and if cognizable offence is made out, his FIR shall be registered. Learned counsel for the applicant / proposed accused at the very outset submits that he would be satisfied and will not press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application further, in case the FIR is lodged against the applicant / proposed accused, no arrest shall be made without collecting tangible evidence to connect the applicant / proposed accused with the commission of the alleged offence. Order accordingly. Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
